postconditions: return value contains only ASCII characters
the returned string is an ASCII-only representation of obj
edge_cases: if obj is a string, returns the string itself
if obj is a bytes object, returns the ASCII-encoded bytes as a string
if obj is a Unicode string, returns the ASCII-encoded Unicode string as a string
if obj is a non-string, non-bytes object, returns a string representation of the object

groq_only: return value contains only ASCII characters
hf_only: the returned string is an ASCII-only representation of obj
if obj is a string, returns the string itself
if obj is a bytes object, returns the ASCII-encoded bytes as a string
if obj is a Unicode string, returns the ASCII-encoded Unicode string as a string
if obj is a non-string, non-bytes object, returns a string representation of the object
